label: Strategy Family Browser
description: Browse all 65+ strategy types across DeFi, CeFi, TradFi, and Sports, grouped by family with configurable parameters.

0.4.note: no any / @ts-ignore (StrategyCatalogEntry[] cast is typed, not any).

0.8.note: — added error guard: renders 'Failed to load strategy catalog.' in text-destructive when useStrategyCatalog returns error.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [strategies]. 0.4 ✓ no any / @ts-ignore (StrategyCatalogEntry[] cast is typed, not any). 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks imports. 0.6 ✓ Spinner rendered when isLoading. 0.7 ✓ 'No strategies found' when strategies.length === 0. 0.8 FIXED — added error guard: renders 'Failed to load strategy catalog.' in text-destructive when useStrategyCatalog returns error. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.1.note: data from useStrategyCatalog() hook, no inline fetch/import.

1.2.note: — this is a strategy type catalog widget showing all 65+ strategy definitions system-wide; it is not scoped to org/client/strategy. Scope filtering does not apply to a reference catalog. 1.3–1.6 N/A — same reason as 1.2.

1.7.note: DOMAIN_COLORS is a local display constant (not reference data needing migration); catalog data served from API.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data from useStrategyCatalog() hook, no inline fetch/import. 1.2 N/A — this is a strategy type catalog widget showing all 65+ strategy definitions system-wide; it is not scoped to org/client/strategy. Scope filtering does not apply to a reference catalog. 1.3–1.6 N/A — same reason as 1.2. 1.7 ✓ DOMAIN_COLORS is a local display constant (not reference data needing migration); catalog data served from API.

findings: L0-0.8: Widget was missing error state handling — useStrategyCatalog returns error from react-query but it was ignored. Fixed: added error guard before empty-state check.
